q:
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
6 10 18 30 46 ?

A, B, C, D, E, F and G are seated around a circular table facing the centre. E is third to the left of D. B is fourth to the right of E. D, F and G are seated to the left of E. C is third to the right of B. G is exactly between B and C. How many people are seated between C and G when counted from the left of C?

What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
4 9 14 19 24 ?

Among the numbers which can be formed using all the given digits, which set of numbers is related in the same way as the set of numbers given below?
(Note: Numbers must be formed using all the given digits without splitting them, e.g. add, subtract, multiply etc. operations on 13 and 13 are not allowed; but 13 and 1 and 3 together cannot be used; the digits must be kept intact and no mathematical operation is allowed on them.)
(15, 39, 87)
(27, 51, 99)

In the given number series, considering the order of the numbers from left to right, answer the asked questions. (All numbers are single-digit, and the numbers given inside brackets are also to be considered as single-digit numbers.)
3 4 1 9 5 1 3 6 5 3 2 7 4 9 8 4 2 7 8 4 2 5 7 6 4 5 (END)
How many such numbers are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an even number and immediately followed by an odd number?

This question is based on the three-digit numbers given below.
(69) 458 625 751 359 245
(Note: 1st digit = 6, 2nd digit = 9, 3rd digit = 7)
(Note: All operations are to be done on the given numbers.)
If the digits in all the numbers are arranged in ascending order within each number, then the positions of how many numbers will remain unchanged?
In a certain code language, 'trust builds bond' is written as 'zn fy tk', and 'keep your trust' is written as 'fy ep rb'. In that language, how is 'trust' written?
In a certain code language, 'FOUR' is written as '5812' and 'ROUT' is written as '5628'. In that language, what is the code for the letter 'T'?

A car starts from point B and travels 37 km towards east, then turns left and travels 40 km, then turns right and travels 55 km, then again turns right and travels 64 km, then turns left and travels 18 km, then turns right and travels 24 km and reaches point A. In which direction from point B is car A located? (Consider point B at 90-degree on the dial of a clock.)

For a given statement, while accepting the statements as true even if they appear to vary from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusion(s) logically follow(s) from the statement.
Statement:
All thinkers are flatterers.
Some thinkers are speakers.
Conclusions:
(I) Some drums are flatterers.
(II) Some speakers are flatterers.

In which of the following alphabet-clusters should the question mark (?) be placed so that they are placed in a particular series?
FEA 40 EDZ 32 DCY 24 CBX 16 ?

Three of the following four alphabet-clusters are alike in a certain way based on the position of letters in the English alphabet and thus form a group. Which alphabet-cluster does NOT belong to that group?
(Note: The number of letters/consonants in the alphabet-cluster is not relevant to the basis of their grouping.)

For the following number-symbol series, answer the question asked considering the order from left to right. (All numbers are single-digit.)
5 € $ 4 9 & & 4 € @ 0 7 @ 7 9 1 8 8 8 % 5 € (END)
How many such numbers are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an odd number and immediately followed by an even number?

Six people, A, B, C, D, E and F, are seated in a row, all facing north. F is third to the left of A. A is third to the right of D. E is at the extreme right end. C is to the right of E. B is exactly between D and A. How many people are seated between C and B?
Based on the position of letters in the English alphabet, JIKO is related to ZYAE in a certain way. Following the same logic, RQSW is related to which of the following alphabet-clusters?
P is 5 km to the south of Q. R is 3 km to the north of Q. S is 10 km to the east of R. P is 5 km to the west of Q. In which direction is S from Q?

Based on the position of letters in the English alphabet, three of the following four alphabet-clusters are alike in a certain way and form a group. Which alphabet-cluster does NOT belong to that group?
(Note: The number of distinct letters/consonants in the alphabet-cluster is not relevant to the basis of their grouping.)
In the number 1748563, each digit is increased by 1 moving from right to left. What will be the sum of the second digit from the left and the second digit from the right of the number so formed?
In the number 756931482, each digit is increased by 2 moving from right to left. What will be the sum of the third digit from the left and the third digit from the right of the number so formed?

Based on the position of letters in the English alphabet, what should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
DEL GFJ JGH MHF ?

For the following number series, answer the question asked considering the order from left to right. (All numbers are single-digit.)
8 1 2 9 6 7 5 1 7 5 9 7 8 4 3 5 6 2 7 4 9 3 5 4 1 6 (END)
How many such numbers are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an even number and immediately followed by an odd number?
On 7 October 2025, where was the national convention organised in India on the occasion of 'World Cotton Day'?
In which of the following missile programmes did India demonstrate 'strategic deterrence capabilities' within 24 hours and over more than two weeks in July 2025?
In which Brazilian city was the 17th BRICS Summit hosted on 6-7 July 2025?
Which of the following government bodies had the highest international cooperation in organising the Imports Conclave 2025?
What is the name of the new submarine commissioned by India on 15 January 2025?
Which author's work 'Paradise Inc.' connects readers across the world through the medium of fiction-writing and digital construction models?
Apart from 30 January, on which other date is the martyrdom day of Bhagat Singh, Rajguru and Sukhdev observed to honour their memory?
Which institution developed an advanced test/treatment related to Haemophilia A and Von Willebrand Disease?
o: All India Institute of Medical Sciences - AIIMS
Indian Council of Medical Research - ICMR

q: Who won the men's singles title at the Italian Open 2025 held in May 2025?
Where was the first edition of the Khelo India Winter Games 2025 held on 23 January?
By which year does Haryana's 2025 Environment Plan aim to completely end the burning of stubble in the state?

According to an August 2025 report, what relief measure has been mentioned for taxpayers in respect of the loans given by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to government and banks due to interest-rate volatility in the American market?
o: Stopping the printing of new currency

q: Which national park was declared the 58th Tiger Reserve of India in March 2025?
In March 2025, who became the youngest cricketer to play in a T20I at the age of 62 years and 147 days?
In May 2025, in which wildlife sanctuary did the Hyderabad-based group HYC (Hyderabad Youth Council) carry out a proposed eco-conservation operation?
In June 2025, which Odia poet was awarded the 'Kete Phula Phutichhi' children's literature prize?
For whom/what was the National Sports Governance Act, 2025 enacted, as per the following?
o: For the protection of players and improvement of the sports system
For the financial supervision of the sports system

q: According to the World Bank, how many people in India were lifted out of extreme poverty between 2011-12 and 2022-23?

In the following, which Indian bank reduced the required minimum balance amount for new account-holders in metro and urban branches from 1 August 2025, by increasing it by Rs.25,000 compared to the earlier Rs.5,000?
In 2025, India launched 'Operation SINDOOR' in response to a terrorist attack. Against which terror infrastructure in which region/area was this operation conducted?
o: Terrorist infrastructure in Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Kashmir
Maoist camps in Rajasthan and Pakistan
